Meaning.En: A team sport played with an oval-shaped ball, where players carry, pass, and kick the ball to score tries by grounding it in the opponent’s in-goal area.
Meaning.Example: He started playing rugby at university and quickly became team captain.

Situation.Vi: Môn thể thao đồng đội phổ biến ở Anh, Úc, New Zealand và các quốc gia Khối Thịnh vượng chung, chơi bằng bóng bầu dục và cho phép xô đẩy, ném bóng sau lưng.
Situation.En: A contact team sport popular in the UK, Australia, New Zealand, and other Commonwealth countries, involving carrying, passing, and kicking an oval ball while allowing tackling and rucks.
